text.title: Portfolio Strategy (70/20/10) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: single product; use product-lifecycle or solo-pivot-decision-framework

branch.question: Existing portfolio memo <=90 days AND no trigger fired?

conclusion.verdict: honour existing memo until trigger or next quarter
run full portfolio rebalance with horizon tags + triggers
